settings.tagline: Premium café vibes, comfort food, signature pizzas, shakes, and unforgettable desserts in Pratap Nagar, Jaipur.
settings.address: 112/SP-4, Sector 11 Rd, near Sect. 11 Govt. Dispensary, Kumbha Marg, Sanganer, Sector 11, Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302033
settings.google_business_query: Cheesy Crazy Cafe, 112/SP-4, Kumbha Marg, Pratap Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan 302033
settings.contact_form_success_message: Thanks! Your message has been sent.

testimonials.name: A cafe customer
testimonials.quote: Loved the vibe, presentation and cheesy dishes. Great place to hang out with friends.

testimonials.name: Local foodie
testimonials.quote: Amazing shakes, loaded pizzas and a premium interior experience in Pratap Nagar.

testimonials.name: Repeat customer
testimonials.quote: The menu variety is huge and the food feels worth the price. Excellent for group visits.
